rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one claim (the need to prune the trial count, DoF spec, and percentage breakdowns in the introduction) but does not mark confidence or missing evidence for other recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors by suggesting changes to the original text without addressing potential downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
